content: {"analyses": [{"source_url": "https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/22790477/", "source_title": "Effect of Thermal Aging on the Tensile Bond Strength at Reduced Areas of Seven Current Adhesives", "source_type": "journal_article", "source_quality": 0.52, "overall_relevance": 0.18, "year": 2012, "authors": [], "venue": "Odontology", "doi": "10.1007/s10266-012-0073-2", "atomic_facts": [{"statement": "Thermal aging via 5,000 thermocycles induced a significant decrease in micro-tensile bond strength values with all seven adhesive systems tested", "direct_quote": "Thermal aging induced a significant decrease in MTBS values with all adhesives tested", "fact_category": "causal_link", "relevance_score": 0.21, "confidence": 0.91, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": ["MTBS", "thermocycling"]}, {"statement": "One-step self-etch adhesives obtained the lowest MTBS results after both aging treatments with significantly reduced adhesive capacity after thermocycling", "direct_quote": "One-step self-etch adhesives obtained the lowest MTBS results after both aging treatments", "fact_category": "causal_link", "relevance_score": 0.17, "confidence": 0.9, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": ["self-etch adhesives", "MTBS"]}, {"statement": "The resistance of resin-dentin bonds to thermal-aging degradation was material dependent", "direct_quote": "The resistance of resin-dentin bonds to thermal-aging degradation was material dependent", "fact_category": "causal_link", "relevance_score": 0.15, "confidence": 0.92, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": ["bond degradation"]}], "evidence_summary": "Dental adhesive study: thermal aging (5000 thermocycles) significantly reduces bond strength.
